aiEvents.title: VibeCoding for Indie Entrepreneurs
aiEvents.location: The Red Fridge Society · 508 Oakland Ave, Austin TX 78703
aiEvents.description: John Davison's twice-monthly workshop for solo founders and leaders of SMBs. Hands-on pair programming using AI tools to solve real business problems. No engineering background required.

aiEvents.title: Beyond Chatbots — The Rise of the AI Agent
aiEvents.location: ACC Rio Grande, Bldg 3000 · 1218 West Ave, Austin TX 78701
aiEvents.description: Jay Boisseau, who founded the Austin AI Alliance and does advanced computing at Google, is hosting an expert panel on the agent revolution — from digital assistant to digital colleague.

aiEvents.title: Prompt Lab
aiEvents.description: Gary Shen and Steve Tran host this event, designed to help you brainstorm how and where to use AI to elevate and accelerate your projects.

aiEvents.title: The AI Implementation Club
aiEvents.description: Every week, Chrissy McDannell hosts a dedicated focus sprint to ship that AI project you've had in mind for weeks.

otherEvents.title: Doing Business In Texas
otherEvents.description: US India Chamber of Commerce is bringing in a panel of leaders to talk about how to win Texas state contracts.

otherEvents.title: Business After Hours — West Austin Chamber
otherEvents.description: For those out west, tired of going downtown for events — West Austin Chamber is hosting this networking evening at Steiner Ranch.

otherEvents.title: The Systems That Power Our City
otherEvents.description: Hear from leaders in policing, energy, and water about the future of ATX — hosted by the Austin Chamber.

otherEvents.title: Woman's Way Business Awards (11th Annual)
otherEvents.description: The 11th annual celebration of Austin's women-owned and women-led businesses. Tickets, tables, and sponsorships available.

otherEvents.title: Thought Experiments on Patios
otherEvents.description: Join interesting people for cold drinks and a series of thought experiments and philosophical quandaries. This one blew up!

otherEvents.title: Investor Breakfast — Meet Laurel Orley (Daily Crunch)
otherEvents.description: Meet Laurel Orley, who founded Daily Crunch in 2020 and has grown it to 9,000+ locations. A curated breakfast for founders and investors.

otherEvents.title: Consumer Week Walk & Talk
otherEvents.location: Mañana Coffee · 111 Sandra Muraida Way, Austin TX 78703
otherEvents.description: Kick off ATX Consumer Week with Marc Nathan, Bree Whitehead, Ben Pfeffer, and a 2.5-mile walk (or ruck) around the lake. Coffee provided.

otherEvents.title: League of Originals — Originals Summit
otherEvents.location: Assembly Hall · 1121 E 7th St, Austin TX 78702
otherEvents.description: 500+ DTC founders gathering at Assembly Hall. 10 panels, four masterclasses, and a happy hour. Retreat also taking place May 6–7.

otherEvents.title: Founders & Funders: Social Dance
otherEvents.description: No pitches or panels. Just laid back music and a li'l two-steppin' with Kevad Belle, Andrew Lane, Zeke Torres and others from Austin's investor and founder community.

otherEvents.title: Austin Under 40 Awards Gala (27th Annual)
otherEvents.location: JW Marriott · 110 E 2nd St, Austin TX 78701
otherEvents.description: The 27th annual celebration of Austin's rising business and community leaders. Presented by Loewy Law Firm, benefiting Austin Sunshine Camps.

otherEvents.title: The 49th Annual Pun-Off World Championships
otherEvents.location: Brush Square Park · behind the O. Henry Museum, Austin TX
otherEvents.description: The world's longest-running annual pun competition, held at Brush Square Park. Free public event. A beloved Austin tradition.
